sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114242" key="xnaustiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χναυστικός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one of a sweet tooth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:1:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
